/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/dosty-speak_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/AppInfo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/AppPaths.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/I18n.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/Settings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/PhraseStore.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/VoiceCatalog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/Speaker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dosty-speak.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o" -o dosty-speak.app/Contents/MacOS/dosty-speak -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
